rulings.Case Title: U.S.BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE FOR VS. JAMES LANE
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 11, 2009, line 1, PLAINTIFF U.S.BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Motion for summary adjudication denied. Plaintiff fails to shift the burden because plaintiff does not demonstrate the precise amount of damages. Equitable lien is a remedy, not a cause of action, and therefore, not subject to summary adjudication under CCP section 437c(f)(1). =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: CONSTANCE SMITH-BRIDGEWATER VS. DIVERSIFIED MANAGEMENT CONSULTANTS, INC et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 11, 2009, line 2, PLAINTIFF CONSTANCE SMITH-BRIDGEWATER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Continued to March 17, 2009, to be heard before Judge Kahn, in Department 604 at 8:45 am. =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: JANET PICKENS VS. KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Declare Pltf A Vexatious Litigant; Request For Prefiling Order And Order Requiring Pltf To Furnish Security
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 11, 2009, line 3, DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, and, DIANE LEUNG Motion To Declare Plaintiff A Vexatious Litigant; Request For Prefiling Order And Order Requiring Plaintiff To Furnish Security. Motion Granted. Hearing required regarding amount of security and date for stay of proceedings. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID REPLOGLE VS. RICHARD ZITRIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Recosider Order Granting Special Motion To Strike; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 11, 2009, line 4, PLAINTIFF DAVID REPLOGLE'S Motion To Reconsider Order Granting Special Motion To Strike; Request For Judicial Notice. Off calendar. On March 4, 2009 the Court struck the motion because plaintiff failed to pay the filing fee. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: PETER ROGOSIN VS. BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurreer Of Deft To Complaint Of Peter Rogosin
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 11, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANT LINDA TRIPOLI'S Demurrer to Complaint of Peter Rogosin. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. Complaint fails to state a cause of action, and is uncertain. Insufficient facts alleged to apprise defendants of claims against them. Plaintiff to comply with CRC 2.112. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: PETER ROGOSIN VS. BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 11, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANT BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT, and, BRIAN BUNGER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. Complaint fails to state a cause of action, and is uncertain. Insufficient facts alleged to apprise defendants of claims against them. Plaintiff to comply with CRC 2.112. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: ANTONIA GALE et al VS. ADRIANO HERMINIO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltf'S Unverified First Amended Complaint; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 11, 2009, line 6, DEFENDANT SAND CANYON CORPORATION, FKA OPTION ONE MORTGAGE, and, DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff's Unverified First Amended Complaint; Request For Judicial Notice. Request for Judicial Notice is denied. Motion to strike is denied. Ten days leave to answer. =(302/CWW/VC)

rulings.Case Title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:$700.OO U.S. et al

rulings.Case Title: BRUCE SMITH VS. ALAN CONSILIO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 11, 2009, line 10, PLAINTIFF BRUCE SMITH'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's motion for summary judgment is granted. Opposition untimely filed. The notice of intent to withdraw and other 37.9A(a)(13) requirements are fulfilled. Defendant fails to create a triable issue of facts. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: BRUCE SMITH VS. ALAN CONSILIO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 11, 2009, line 10, DEFENDANT ALAN CONSILIO, and, SANTIAGO MORALES'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendants' motion for summary judgment is denied. Failure to shift burden of proof.= (302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: ROGER CHEW et al VS. JAMES TAUGHER et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 11, 2009, line 11, Defendants Andrew Damele and Douglas Singler's Motion for Summary Judgment/or in the Alternative summary adjudiction. Motion for summary judgment denied. Triable issue of fact whether February rent was paid. =(302/CWW/VC)
